message:
fix: parallelize per-cluster metric collection in captureSnapshot (#8853) (#8865)

MetricsHistory.captureSnapshot() iterated FindPodIssues and GetGPUNodes
sequentially over every cluster, each under the shared snapshot ctx that
carries a 30-second deadline (metricsHistoryTimeout). At 50+ clusters
typical round-trips exhaust the budget and the snapshot logs
"context deadline exceeded" for the last clusters in the list, producing
partial data.

Fans the two per-cluster loops out to goroutines under a sync.WaitGroup,
with a sync.Mutex guarding snapshot.PodIssues / snapshot.GPUNodes
appends. Per-goroutine pre-builds its entries locally and takes the
lock only once to splice them in — keeps lock contention O(clusters)
rather than O(pods+gpus). All fan-outs share the same snapshot ctx, so
the 30-second deadline still bounds the whole operation end-to-end.

Credit @Pranjal6955 for the audit find.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
